name: The Werewolf Hills
short_description: The Werewolf Hills is a First Person Shooter that tells the adventure of a person that get lost in a mysterious mountain where a fierce monster lays in the nights.
detailed_description:
Go in this FPS adventure protecting yourself against the dangers with different weapons like guns, crossbows, explosives, etc. You will need to look for ammo, items and other useful stuff in dangerous places for survive and as you go, you will be discover the mysteries of that hill.

Synopsis
You are lost, driving on a hill and your car is being out of fuel and you dont know what to do. Your only option will be search for help, but something bad are happening in the nearest town.
As you go, you will notice that the hills are invaded of dangerous sectarians and also a fierce monster, so get help wont be so easy, you will need to search for weapons and kill them if you dont want to die.
Finally the night comes and you hear a fierce howl..

supported_languages:
English*, Spanish - Spain, Spanish - Latin America
*languages with full audio support
